label: GDPR adopted
effect: The European Parliament and Council adopted Regulation (EU) 2016/679.

label: GDPR entered into force
effect: The Regulation entered into force twenty days after publication.

label: GDPR became applicable
effect: The Regulation became generally applicable across the EU.

label: EU AI Act signed
effect: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 was signed following the legislative process.

label: EU AI Act entered into force
effect: The Regulation entered into force twenty days after publication in the Official Journal.

label: Chapters I and II began to apply
effect: The general provisions and prohibited-AI-practices chapter began to apply under Article 113(a).

label: Additional AI Act provisions began to apply
effect: The provisions listed in Article 113(b), including the general-purpose AI chapter and specified governance and penalty provisions, began to apply, subject to the stated exception.

label: General AI Act application date
effect: Most remaining provisions are scheduled to apply, subject to Article 113 and transitional provisions.

label: Article 6(1) and corresponding obligations scheduled
effect: Article 6(1) and the corresponding obligations are scheduled to apply under Article 113(c).

label: EO 14110 signed
effect: The President signed the executive order directing federal executive-branch action on AI.

label: EO 14110 revoked
effect: Executive Order 14148 expressly revoked EO 14110.

label: EO 14179 signed
effect: The order established a new executive-branch AI policy direction and required an AI Action Plan and review of actions taken under EO 14110.

label: SB 1047 introduced
effect: The bill entered the California legislative process.

label: SB 1047 enrolled
effect: The Legislature sent the enrolled bill to the Governor.

label: SB 1047 vetoed
effect: The Governor returned the bill without signature; it did not become law.

label: NIST AI RMF 1.0 released
effect: NIST published the first full version as a voluntary framework.

label: PIPL adopted
effect: The Standing Committee of the National People's Congress adopted the law.

label: PIPL took effect
effect: The law became effective.

label: Cybersecurity Law took effect
effect: The original Cybersecurity Law became effective.

source.label: Cyberspace Administration of China / National People's Congress

label: Cybersecurity Law amendment adopted
effect: The Standing Committee adopted amendments including new AI-related language, updated liability provisions, and renumbering.

label: Amended Cybersecurity Law took effect
effect: The 2025 amended text became the current law; provision numbering changed.

source.label: Cyberspace Administration of China / National People's Congress

label: Network Data Regulations promulgated
effect: State Council Order No. 790 promulgated the administrative regulation.

source.label: State Council of the People's Republic of China

label: Network Data Regulations took effect
effect: The administrative regulation became effective.

source.label: State Council of the People's Republic of China

label: Generative AI Measures issued
effect: The seven issuing authorities adopted and issued the joint measures.

label: Generative AI Measures took effect
effect: The joint departmental measures became effective.

label: UK GDPR operated as domestic law
effect: At the end of the EU transition period, the retained and modified regulation operated as the UK GDPR alongside the Data Protection Act 2018.

label: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 received Royal Assent
effect: The Act enacted amendments to the UK GDPR and related data-protection legislation, subject to commencement provisions.

label: First DUAA commencement regulations took effect
effect: The first commencement regulations brought specified UK GDPR and Data Protection Act amendments into force.

label: APPI enacted
effect: Act No. 57 of 2003 was promulgated.

label: APPI private-sector rules generally took effect
effect: The original comprehensive private-sector framework became generally effective, later subject to substantial amendments.

label: AI Guidelines for Business Version 1.2 released
effect: METI and the AI Safety Institute published the current Version 1.2 materials and tentative translations.

source.label: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

label: PIPEDA received Royal Assent
effect: The federal statute was enacted, with phased commencement to follow.

source.label: Justice Laws Website, Government of Canada

label: PIPEDA Part 1 began phased application
effect: The federal private-sector privacy framework began operating, with application broadened through later phases.

source.label: Justice Laws Website, Government of Canada

label: Latest in-force amendment shown in current consolidation
effect: The Justice Laws consolidation current to 26 May 2026 reports 4 March 2025 as the last amendment date.

source.label: Justice Laws Website, Government of Canada

label: Automated Decision-Making Directive took effect
effect: The federal administrative policy took effect, with compliance required no later than 1 April 2020 for covered systems.

label: Current directive revision published
effect: The current version added or updated requirements and provided transition periods for existing systems and Agents of Parliament.

label: Transition to updated directive requirements ended
effect: Existing systems covered by the transition and Agents of Parliament reached the stated compliance date for new or updated requirements.

label: DPDP Act received assent
effect: The Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 was enacted subject to commencement by notification.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

label: First DPDP Act provisions commenced
effect: Sections listed in paragraph (a) of G.S.R. 843(E), including institutional and rulemaking provisions, took effect on publication.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: One-year DPDP provisions scheduled
effect: Section 6(9) and Section 27(1)(d) are scheduled to take effect one year after Gazette publication.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: Most substantive DPDP provisions scheduled
effect: Most processing duties, rights, enforcement, and remaining listed provisions are scheduled to take effect eighteen months after Gazette publication.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: DPDP Rules published; selected rules commenced
effect: Rules 1, 2, and 17–21 took effect on publication under Rule 1(2).

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: DPDP Rule 4 scheduled
effect: Rule 4 is scheduled to take effect one year after Gazette publication.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: Most operational DPDP Rules scheduled
effect: Rules 3, 5–16, 22, and 23 are scheduled to take effect eighteen months after Gazette publication.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology / Gazette of India

label: Hiroshima principles and code announced
effect: G7 leaders issued a statement with international guiding principles and a code of conduct for organizations developing advanced AI systems.

source.label: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan

label: Comprehensive Policy Framework endorsed
effect: G7 leaders endorsed the Hiroshima AI Process Comprehensive Policy Framework.

source.label: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan

label: UN AI Advisory Body convened
effect: The Secretary-General convened the multi-stakeholder High-level Advisory Body on AI for a twelve-month mandate.

label: Governing AI for Humanity released
effect: The Advisory Body released its final report with seven recommendations for global AI governance.

label: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 published
effect: ISO recorded Edition 1 of the international AI management-system standard as published.

label: Ethically Aligned Design First Edition published
effect: IEEE Standards Association lists the First Edition as a published white paper.

label: OECD Council adopted the AI Recommendation
effect: The OECD Council adopted the Recommendation on Artificial Intelligence at ministerial level.

label: OECD AI Principles updated
effect: The OECD Ministerial Council Meeting adopted revisions addressing newer AI developments and strengthening coverage of safety, information integrity, responsible conduct, transparency, sustainability, and policy interoperability.

label: Bletchley Declaration agreed
effect: Countries and organizations attending the 2023 AI Safety Summit agreed the non-binding declaration on frontier-AI safety and international cooperation.

label: New Zealand joined the Bletchley commitment
effect: The official declaration page records New Zealand as joining the commitment, with the published participant list updated in February 2025.

label: Singapore PDPA completed its principal commencement phases
effect: The principal data-protection obligations had commenced following the Act's staged implementation.

label: Act 19 of 2025 amendment took effect
effect: The Singapore Statutes Online timeline records the amendment of the PDPA by Act 19 of 2025 from this date.

label: Second Edition released
effect: Singapore released the second edition of its voluntary Model Artificial Intelligence Governance Framework.

label: AI Verify international MVP launched
effect: IMDA launched the minimum viable AI governance testing framework and toolkit for an international pilot.

label: AI Verify Foundation launched
effect: The toolkit entered an open-source community phase supported by the AI Verify Foundation.

label: Korea PIPA entered into force
effect: The comprehensive Personal Information Protection Act became effective.

label: Current Act No. 20897 version became effective
effect: The current Korean consolidation reflects Act No. 20897 from this date, while later promulgated amendments remain future-effective.

label: Korea AI Framework Act entered into force
effect: Act No. 20676 and the first effective phase of its amendment became operative.

label: Final Act No. 21311 phase scheduled
effect: The remaining specified changes in Act No. 21311 are scheduled to take effect two days after the dataset snapshot.

label: Compilation No. 104 became current
effect: The Federal Register identifies compilation C2026C00227 as the latest compilation from this date.

label: Mandatory AI guardrails consultation opened
effect: The Australian Government published a proposals paper and opened consultation on mandatory guardrails for high-risk AI.

label: Mandatory proposal not taken forward
effect: The government moved to voluntary Guidance for AI Adoption and stated that it would not proceed with mandatory guardrails at that time.

label: Guidance for AI Adoption released
effect: The government released the Foundations and Implementation Practices voluntary guidance materials.

source.label: Department of Industry, Science and Resources

label: LGPD general provisions took effect
effect: The LGPD's general substantive provisions entered into force, with administrative sanctions following later.

source.label: Presidency of the Republic of Brazil

label: Law No. 15,352 amended the ANPD framework
effect: The amendment changed the institutional position of the ANPD and forms part of the current Portuguese consolidation.

source.label: Presidency of the Republic of Brazil

label: PL 2338/2023 introduced
effect: The bill began its federal legislative process in the Senate.

label: Federal Senate approved a substitute
effect: The Senate approved a revised text, after which the bill proceeded to the Chamber of Deputies without becoming law.

label: UAE Federal PDPL entered into force
effect: Federal Decree by Law No. 45 of 2021 became effective at federal level.

label: Dubai AI ethics toolkit launched
effect: Smart Dubai introduced the ethics principles, implementation guidelines, and self-assessment tool.

label: UAE Generative AI Guide published
effect: The UAE Artificial Intelligence Office published its educational guide to generative-AI concepts and uses.

label: Amended Saudi PDPL took effect
effect: The amended Personal Data Protection Law and its implementation framework became effective.

label: Saudi PDPL compliance grace period ended
effect: The one-year adjustment period following effectiveness ended.

source.label: Saudi Data and Artificial Intelligence Authority

label: SDAIA AI Ethics Principles Version 1.0 released
effect: SDAIA published the national voluntary AI ethics and self-assessment framework.

source.label: Saudi Data and Artificial Intelligence Authority

label: Further Taiwan PDPA amendments promulgated without a commencement date
effect: Specified amendments were promulgated but remain outside the effective current text until dates are set by the Executive Yuan.

source.label: Taiwan Ministry of Justice Laws and Regulations Database

label: Taiwan AI Basic Act promulgated and took effect
effect: The President promulgated the 20-Article framework law, which took effect on the same date.

label: Executive Yuan generative-AI guidelines formally issued
effect: The Executive Yuan issued practical reference guidance for itself and subordinate agencies and institutions.

label: Hong Kong PDPO core provisions took effect
effect: The principal data-protection framework and Data Protection Principles became operative.

label: Anti-doxxing amendments took effect
effect: The 2021 amendments created new doxxing offences and enforcement powers while section 33 remained uncommenced.

label: AI Model Personal Data Protection Framework issued
effect: The PCPD published an operational model framework for organizational AI procurement, implementation, and management.

source.label: Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data, Hong Kong

label: Hong Kong ethical AI guidance issued
effect: The PCPD published guidance on ethical development and use of AI.

source.label: Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data, Hong Kong

label: Employee generative-AI checklist issued
effect: The PCPD released practical policy elements for organizations governing employee use of generative AI.

source.label: Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data, Hong Kong

label: Indonesia PDP Law enacted and took effect
effect: Law No. 27 of 2022 entered into force with a two-year adjustment period.

label: Indonesia PDP adjustment period ended
effect: The statutory two-year adjustment period expired.

label: Constitutional Court modified the Article 53 DPO trigger
effect: Decision 151/PUU-XXII/2024 affected the conditions for designating a data-protection officer and must be read with the statute.

label: Viet Nam Personal Data Protection Law took effect
effect: Law No. 91/2025/QH15 became the primary national personal-data statute.

label: Decree 356/2025 took effect
effect: The implementing decree became effective together with the Personal Data Protection Law and replaced Decree 13/2023.

label: Decree 13/2023 repealed
effect: Article 42(2) of Decree 356/2025 replaced the former decree-centered regime.

label: POPIA general compliance phase completed
effect: The one-year grace period following principal commencement ended and section 58(2) commenced.

label: Nigeria Data Protection Act received assent
effect: The President assented to Act No. 37 of 2023 and it entered into force.

label: Bill C-27 introduced
effect: The proposed Artificial Intelligence and Data Act appeared as Part 3 of Bill C-27.

label: Bill C-27 and AIDA lapsed
effect: Prorogation ended the session before the bill received Royal Assent, so AIDA never became law.

label: Colorado SB 24-205 signed
effect: The Governor signed the original Colorado high-risk AI framework into law.

label: SB 26-189 replaced the SB 24-205 pathway
effect: Colorado enacted a repeal-and-reenactment framework before the original principal duties became operative.

label: Colorado SB 26-189 signed
effect: The Governor signed the Act; specified provisions took immediate effect while the principal regulated-actor duties remained scheduled for 1 January 2027.

label: Colorado ADMT principal duties scheduled
effect: The principal developer, deployer, notice, consumer-right, and recordkeeping duties are scheduled to begin.

label: Revised Swiss FADP took effect
effect: The completely revised Federal Act on Data Protection and related implementing rules entered into force.

label: Section 58(2) prior-authorization applicability date
effect: Although section 58(2) commenced on 1 July 2021, the regulator postponed its application to section 57 processing until 1 February 2022.

source.label: South African Department of Justice and Constitutional Development

label: Digital Omnibus on AI received final Council approval
effect: The amending regulation was finally approved, with revised high-risk and transparency application dates; this snapshot waits for an Official Journal legal-act record before treating those amendments as operative law.

label: Majority of DUAA 2025 Part 5 privacy changes took effect
effect: The main Part 5 privacy amendments identified in the UK commencement plan became operative in the domestic UK GDPR framework.

source.label: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 (Commencement No. 6) Regulations 2026

label: DUAA section 103 complaint-procedure amendment took effect
effect: The controller complaint-procedure requirement identified in section 103 entered into force as a later privacy-law commencement point.

label: 2026 APPI amendment promulgated with limited immediate provisions
effect: The amendment was promulgated and only expressly identified supplementary provisions took immediate effect; the substantive package remained predominantly future-effective.

label: Six-month APPI amendment tranche scheduled
effect: The procedural, enforcement and penalty provisions listed for six-month commencement are scheduled to take effect; provision-specific verification remains required.

source.label: Promulgated APPI amendment — Supplementary Provision Article 1

label: Latest statutory deadline for principal APPI amendment commencement
effect: The principal package must commence on a Cabinet Order date no later than two years after promulgation; this is a deadline, not an assertion that 17 July 2028 is the operative date.

source.label: Promulgated APPI amendment — Supplementary Provision Article 1

label: Official DPDP Rules corrigendum published
effect: The Gazette Rules must be read with the official corrigendum; the staged commencement dates remain separately modeled.

source.label: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

label: Act No. 21445 first future phase scheduled
effect: The first specified phase of the promulgated 2026 amendment is scheduled to enter into force; it is not part of the current text at the snapshot date.

source.label: Korean Law Information Center — Act No. 21445

label: Act No. 21445 second future phase scheduled
effect: The remaining identified phase of the promulgated 2026 amendment is scheduled to enter into force on this date.

source.label: Korean Law Information Center — Act No. 21445

label: APP automated-decision transparency amendments scheduled
effect: APP 1.7–1.9 transparency requirements for qualifying substantially automated decisions are scheduled to commence; they are not current duties at the snapshot date.

source.label: Federal Register of Legislation — Privacy and Other Legislation Amendment Act 2024

label: Renamed Personal Data Protection Act framework generally took effect
effect: The renamed and substantially revised current-form statutory framework generally entered into force, while the statute retained its predecessor lineage from 1995.

source.label: Taiwan Ministry of Justice — legislative history
